page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8te.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance configured on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at a base frequency of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, the instance provides dedicated, non-shared CPU execution resources. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

Acceleration is delivered via two integrated NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. This hardware profile is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. However, the instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network block storage. Additionally, it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.gn8te.8xlarge offers a high-performance balance of dedicated Intel Xeon processing cores and modern Ada Lovelace GPU architecture. The lack of local storage represents a key architectural tradeoff, requiring reliance on network-attached storage which may impact high-throughput disk I/O workloads. The instance is suited for workloads such as GPU-accelerated machine learning inference, data science pipelines, 3D rendering, and compute-heavy parallel processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8te.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated physical cores from an Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at 3.3 GHz, utilizing a single-thread-per-core architecture to ensure dedicated compute performance. The system features 256.0 GB of RAM alongside two NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs that deliver a combined 96 GB of VRAM. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. A key architectural tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, necessitating network-attached storage solutions. This hardware configuration is designed for parallel processing tasks, including machine learning inference, data science, and graphics rendering workloads.

tagline: A dedicated compute instance featuring dual NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs and 256 GB RAM for parallel processing and machine learning workloads.
